column1: She washes _____ bike every day. How often do you wash _____? (she, you)
The president _____ will take part in the meeting. (he)
The _____ Friday in December was the _____ of December. (two, nine)
Whose camera is it? - It's my _____ camera. (uncle)
The box is _____ but the suitcase is much _____ . (heavy, heavy)
Can you wash the clothes? - Yes, I can wash _____ . (they)
He'll bring _____ map and I'll bring _____ . (he, I)
